changelog.title: Phase 6 — Future Tools Framework
changelog.description: Built the /tools route architecture, tools registry, client-side compute framework, and dynamic /tools/[slug] pages.

changelog.title: Phase 5 — SEO, Analytics & Performance
changelog.description: Google Analytics, sitemap, robots.txt, canonical URLs, Open Graph metadata, and OG preview image across all routes.

changelog.title: Phase 4 — Support, Contact & Legal
changelog.description: Built /contact with secure spam-protected form, /support with Razorpay/UPI, and all legal pages.

changelog.title: Finance & productivity tools — first release
changelog.description: Loan EMI calculator and SIP returns planner shipping as the first real interactive tools.
